name: Chris Redfield
description:
For Vastraler as an end of 2023 gift 🩷

(Demihuman AU) Due to Chris' PTSD following his battle with Glenn Arias, he is assigned a demihuman support.

He can't even take care of himself and now he has a 'pet' to take care of?!

*Demihuman description belonging to Vastraler*
creator: Merawlee
